message:
fix(vdbe): remove unnecessary Box allocation in aggregate expression comparisons

Both aggregate dedup checks were creating a new Box<Expr> via
Box::new(exprs[0].clone()) just to compare with an existing
Box<Expr>. This caused unnecessary heap allocation on every
comparison and emitted `unused_allocation` warnings.

Changed to dereference-based comparison (**arg_expr == exprs[0])
which compares the underlying Expr values directly without allocation.

Closes #16

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
